title: stelis surrogatilabia
intro: Stelis surrogatilabia, also known as the False Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. These properties are believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. In traditional medicine, Stelis surrogatilabia is often prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the plant's leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
